# Constraints

Tests for constraint files in dependency resolution.

## Basic constraints

### Constraints from file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraints_txt -->

Resolve a package with constraints from a separate file.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```toml constraints.txt
idna<3.4
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
anyio==3.7.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.3
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Install with constraints

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_txt -->

Install packages with constraints from a separate file.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==3.7.0
```

```toml constraints.txt
idna<3.4
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==3.7.0
 + idna==3.3
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

### Inline constraints

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_inline -->

Install with constraints referenced inline in requirements file.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==3.7.0
-c constraints.txt
```

```toml constraints.txt
idna<3.4
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==3.7.0
 + idna==3.3
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

## Constraints from pyproject.toml

### tool.uv.constraint-dependencies

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_from_pyproject -->

Constraints defined in `tool.uv.constraint-dependencies` are respected.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "example"
version = "0.0.0"
dependencies = [
  "anyio==3.7.0"
]

[tool.uv]
constraint-dependencies = [
  "idna<3.4"
]
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==3.7.0
 + idna==3.3
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

## Constraints with markers

### Constraints with Python version marker

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraints_markers -->

Constraints can include markers to apply them conditionally.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml constraints.txt
sniffio==1.3.0;python_version>'3.7'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
anyio==4.3.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.0
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Constraints with platform marker

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_with_markers -->

Constraints with platform markers that don't match current environment are ignored.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
pytest
```

```toml constraints.txt
pytest==8.0.0; sys_platform == 'nonexistent-platform'
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 4 packages in [TIME]
Installed 4 packages in [TIME]
 + iniconfig==2.0.0
 + packaging==24.0
 + pluggy==1.4.0
 + pytest==8.1.1
```

## Constraints with extras

### Constraint on extra dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraint_extra -->

Constraints with extras enforce the version, but don't add the extra to output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask
```

```toml constraints.txt
flask[dotenv]<24.3.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.2
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Constrain extra dependency

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_extra -->

Constrain a package that's included via an extra.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
flask[dotenv]
```

```toml constraints.txt
python-dotenv==1.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt -c constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 8 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 8 packages in [TIME]
Installed 8 packages in [TIME]
 + blinker==1.7.0
 + click==8.1.7
 + flask==3.0.2
 + itsdangerous==2.1.2
 + jinja2==3.1.3
 + markupsafe==2.1.5
 + python-dotenv==1.0.0
 + werkzeug==3.0.1
```

## Remote constraints

### Remote constraint file

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_remote -->

Constraints can be loaded from a remote URL.

```console
$ uv pip install -c https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apache/airflow/constraints-2-6/constraints-3.11.txt typing_extensions>=4.0
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + typing-extensions==4.7.1
```

### Inline remote constraint

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_constraints_inline_remote -->

Remote constraints can be referenced inline in requirements file.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
typing-extensions>=4.0
-c https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apache/airflow/constraints-2-6/constraints-3.11.txt
```

```console
$ uv pip install -r requirements.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
Prepared 1 package in [TIME]
Installed 1 package in [TIME]
 + typing-extensions==4.7.1
```

## URL constraints

### Compatible URL constraint

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraints_compatible_url -->

Constraint can pin a package to a specific URL if version is compatible.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio>4
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bf/cd/d6d9bb1dadf73e7af02d18225cbd2c93f8552e13130484f1c8dcfece292b/anyio-4.2.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bf/cd/d6d9bb1dadf73e7af02d18225cbd2c93f8552e13130484f1c8dcfece292b/anyio-4.2.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### URL constrained by version

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraints_compatible_url_version -->

A direct URL requirement can be constrained by version.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bf/cd/d6d9bb1dadf73e7af02d18225cbd2c93f8552e13130484f1c8dcfece292b/anyio-4.2.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio>4
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bf/cd/d6d9bb1dadf73e7af02d18225cbd2c93f8552e13130484f1c8dcfece292b/anyio-4.2.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Incompatible URL constraint

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_constraints_incompatible_url -->

URL constraint with incompatible version causes resolution failure.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio<4
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bf/cd/d6d9bb1dadf73e7af02d18225cbd2c93f8552e13130484f1c8dcfece292b/anyio-4.2.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because only anyio>=4 is available and you require anyio<4, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```

## Build constraints

### Incompatible build constraint

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::incompatible_build_constraint -->

Build constraints restrict versions of build dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
requests==1.2
```

```toml build_constraints.txt
setuptools==1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.txt --build-constraint build_constraints.txt
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × Failed to download and build `requests==1.2.0`
  ├─▶ Failed to resolve requirements from `setup.py` build
  ├─▶ No solution found when resolving: `setuptools>=40.8.0`
  ╰─▶ Because you require setuptools>=40.8.0 and setuptools==1, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```

### Compatible build constraint

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compatible_build_constraint -->

Build constraints that satisfy build requirements work correctly.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
requests==1.2
```

```toml build_constraints.txt
setuptools>=40
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.txt --build-constraint build_constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.txt --build-constraint build_constraints.txt
requests==1.2.0
    # via -r requirements.txt

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Build constraints in pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::incompatible_build_constraint_in_pyproject_toml -->

Build constraints can be defined in `tool.uv.build-constraint-dependencies`.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = [
    "requests==1.2",
]

[tool.uv]
build-constraint-dependencies = [
    "setuptools==1",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × Failed to download and build `requests==1.2.0`
  ├─▶ Failed to resolve requirements from `setup.py` build
  ├─▶ No solution found when resolving: `setuptools>=40.8.0`
  ╰─▶ Because you require setuptools>=40.8.0 and setuptools==1, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```
